headline: Is Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) among the Best Automation Stocks to Buy for Warehouse Construction?
summary: With an upside potential of 28.71%, Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is among the 7 Best Automation Stocks to Buy for Warehouse Construction. Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) received additional analyst support on June 1 when Citi raised its price target on the stock to $252 from $246 while maintaining a Neutral rating. The firm viewed the company’s first-quarter results favorably […]
